nasb.text: They do not crowd each other, They march everyone in his path; When they burst through the defenses, They do not break ranks.

esv.text: They do not jostle one another; each marches in his path; they burst through the weapons and are not halted.

cnv.text: 他們彼此不擁擠， 各按自己的道前行； 甚至他們持著兵器跌倒， 也不會被剪除。

ccb.text: 队伍整齐，各行其道， 势如破竹，无坚不摧。
